title: Charred Croatian Meat Bake
description: A hearty, low-carb friendly Croation dish perfect for a lazy Sunday. The sweetness of the tempering chocolate balances the smokiness of the charred meat.

ingredients.name: 1.5 pounds chunky beef (such as chuck or brisket)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they start to caramelize, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth, bay leaf, and paprika to the pot. Stir to combine.
Return the beef to the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
Transfer the pot to the oven and bake at 300°F for 2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the tempering chocolate until melted.
Season the meat with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
